name: standards closed-loop validation verifies the synthetic source promoted rule appears in the active rule set
command: mkdir -p active-rules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-source test-std --rules-out active-rules 2>out.txt && [ -f active-rules/test-std-1-1.yaml ] && grep -q 'verify=rule_present_in_active_set' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
